\tzpentry{ID3434}{Full Spectral Gap Laplacian Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3434 introduces Full Spectral Gap Laplacian Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$ \Delta\phi(\chi) = \pi\left(\frac{32}{27} - 1\right) = \pi\left(\frac{5}{27}\right) \approx 0.5818 \text{ radians} \approx 33.34^\circ $$
